_comment: WebhookConfig fixture for WAIT_FOR_WEBHOOK inside DO_WHILE (wait_for_webhook_in_do_while_test.json). The key behaviour being tested: inside a DO_WHILE loop, each iteration creates a task with a reference name like 'waitForItem__1', 'waitForItem__2', etc. The hash computation strips the '__N' suffix so the WebhookConfig's stored matcher (keyed by 'waitForItem') resolves to the correct hash on every iteration. POST {"item": {"batchId": "batch-99", "status": "processed"}} once per expected loop iteration.
name: batch-item-processor-webhook
